title: Chewy Festive Tomato Salad
description: A fresh and chewy French-inspired dish featuring ripe tomatoes, toasted nuts, and festive touches for a delightful appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Ripe tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are fresh and juicy

ingredients.name: Toasted sliced almonds
ingredients.notes: Use a food processor or knife to crush into smaller pieces if preferred

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley leaves
ingredients.notes: Chopped for added freshness and color

ingredients.name: Lemon juice
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons fresh, or 1 tablespoon bottled lemon juice

instructions: Toast sliced almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat until golden brown. Allow to cool and then crush into smaller pieces using a food processor or knife.
Halve the tomatoes and sprinkle with salt; let sit for about 10 minutes before discarding the excess water.
In a large bowl, combine halved tomatoes, crushed red pepper flakes, olive oil, lemon juice, and toasted almonds. Mix gently to coat evenly.
Fold in chopped parsley leaves and black olives. Adjust seasoning with more salt if needed.
Serve immediately for best texture and flavor.
